Douris

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
White-Ground Lekythos by Douris
by Douris
Classical Greek · Douris · c. 490 BCE
An oil vessel painted by Douris with Atalanta pursued by Erotes — the huntress heroine running among winged loves. White-ground lekythoi were funerary, often gifts at a grave.
←Gerrit Dou Clara Wolcott Driscoll→
